title: FANET UAV Simulation Artifact
description: Executable Python code and reproducible CSV data for a FANET-based UAV simulation framework with synthetic mobility, AirSim-compatible trace replay, routing abstractions, probabilistic wireless-channel metrics, and optional physical logging interfaces.

creators.name: ERKALKAN, Ercan
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Technologies, Marmara University, Vocational School of Technical Sciences

notes: The repository intentionally excludes manuscript source files and writing-only review material. Bundled CSV outputs and sample traces are included for reproducibility; data files are also marked as CC BY 4.0 in DATA_LICENSE.
